languages.text: Hits wih this weapon apply burning. Targets hit by this weapon always fail tests to remove burning

languages.text: 攻撃時に燃焼状態にする。この武器で攻撃した相手は燃焼状態を解除する試練に必ず失敗する。
languages.original_text: On hit, inflicts burning. Targets hit by this weapon always fail tests to remove burning.

traits.locale_text: 攻撃時に燃焼状態にする。この武器で攻撃した相手は燃焼状態を解除する試練に必ず失敗する。

languages.text: 命中时造成燃烧。被此武器击中的目标在移除燃烧的检定中必定失败。
languages.original_text: On hit, inflicts burning. Targets hit by this weapon always fail tests to remove burning.

traits.locale_text: 命中时造成燃烧。被此武器击中的目标在移除燃烧的检定中必定失败。

languages.text: Vuruş hâlinde yanma oluşturur. Bu silahın vurduğu hedefler, yanmayı kaldırma testinde her daim başarısız olur.
languages.original_text: On hit, inflicts burning. Targets hit by this weapon always fail tests to remove burning.

traits.locale_text: Vuruş hâlinde yanma oluşturur. Bu silahın vurduğu hedefler, yanmayı kaldırma testinde her daim başarısız olur.
İsabet ettiğinde, yanmaya neden olur. Bu silahla vurulan hedefler, yanmayı gidermek için yapılan testlerde daima başarısız olur.

languages.text: Al impactar, inflige quemadura. Los objetivos alcanzados por esta arma fallan cualquier prueba para eliminar quemadura automáticamente.
languages.original_text: On hit, inflicts burning. Targets hit by this weapon always fail tests to remove burning.

traits.locale_text: Al impactar, inflige quemadura. Los objetivos alcanzados por esta arma fallan cualquier prueba para eliminar quemadura automáticamente.

languages.text: Inflige Combustion en touchant la cible. Les cibles touchées par cette arme échouent toujours aux tests permettant de supprimer Combustion.
languages.original_text: On hit, inflicts burning. Targets hit by this weapon always fail tests to remove burning.

traits.locale_text: Inflige Combustion en touchant la cible. Les cibles touchées par cette arme échouent toujours aux tests permettant de supprimer Combustion.

languages.text: Verursacht im Falle eines Treffers "Verbrennen". Von dieser Waffe getroffene Ziele können "Verbrennen" nicht entfernen.
languages.original_text: On hit, inflicts burning. Targets hit by this weapon always fail tests to remove burning.

traits.locale_text: Verursacht im Falle eines Treffers "Verbrennen". Von dieser Waffe getroffene Ziele können "Verbrennen" nicht entfernen.

languages.text: При попадании это оружие накладывает горение на цель. Она всегда проваливает проверку при попытке снять горение.
languages.original_text: On hit, inflicts burning. Targets hit by this weapon always fail tests to remove burning.
